title: Alumni Talk – Department of Electrical Engineering
content: Event Date: April 8, 2025 Event brief description – The Department of Electrical Engineering, University Polytechnic, Galgotias University successfully organized an Alumni Talk on April 8, 2025. The session featured Mr. Tapishwar Parashar, an accomplished alumnus from the 2020–2023 batch, currently serving as an Engineer at Delta Electronics India Pvt. Ltd. The talk aimed to bridge the gap between academic learning and industry expectations by offering students a firsthand account of the transition from college life to a professional engineering career. Mr. Parashar shared his experiences, challenges, and key learnings from his journey, providing valuable insights into the corporate world, project management, and the evolving role of electrical engineers in the industrial automation sector. Event Detailed Description: The Department of Electrical Engineering, University Polytechnic, Galgotias University, organized an insightful Alumni Talk on April 8, 2025. The session featured Mr. Tapishwar Parashar, a proud alumnus from the 2020–2023 batch, who is currently working as an Engineer at Delta Electronics India Pvt. Ltd. The event was designed to foster a strong alumni-student connect and to provide students with a practical perspective on life beyond academics. The session commenced at 11:30 AM with a warm welcome to Mr. Parashar, followed by a brief introduction highlighting his academic background and professional achievements. As an engineer at one of the leading companies in the power and energy sector, Mr. Parashar brought with him a wealth of experience and insight into the industry. During his talk, Mr. Parashar candidly shared his journey from being a student at Galgotias to securing a reputable position in the corporate world. He emphasized the importance of strong fundamentals in electrical engineering, continuous learning, and the significance of soft skills in today’s competitive environment. He also spoke about the challenges he faced during campus placements, the transition from college life to a professional setting, and the work culture at Delta Electronics. One of the most valuable aspects of the session was his practical advice on skill development. Mr. Parashar encouraged students to make the best use of available resources, explore internships, work on real-world projects, and stay updated with emerging technologies. He highlighted how dedication, networking, and the right attitude play a critical role in shaping one’s career. The students showed great enthusiasm throughout the session and actively participated in the interactive Q&A segment. They asked relevant questions related to job opportunities, industry expectations, and the role of certifications and extra-curricular activities. Mr. Parashar patiently addressed each query and shared valuable tips to help students prepare for their professional journeys. The talk concluded with a heartfelt vote of thanks and a token of appreciation presented to Mr. Parashar by the department. A group photograph was taken to mark the occasion and celebrate the continued bond between the institution and its alumni. Overall, the Alumni Talk was a resounding success. It not only inspired the students but also gave them a clearer understanding of the pathway from academics to industry. Events like these play a crucial role in building a supportive alumni network and guiding current students toward informed career choices. Department Name: Galgotias Polytechnic Event Outcome: Industry Insight: Students gained valuable exposure to real-world industry practices and expectations through the personal experiences shared by alumnus Tapishwar Parashar. Career Guidance: The session offered practical tips on placements, skill development, and transitioning from academics to a professional work environment. Alumni Engagement: The event strengthened alumni relations and highlighted the importance of alumni as role models and mentors for current students.
